mapper.select: SELECT id, name, role, gender, company, address, email, content, date FROM feedback WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, role, gender, company, address, email, content, date FROM feedback ORDER BY date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (name, role, gender, company, address, email, content, date) VALUES (#{name}, #{role}, #{gender}, #{company}, #{address}, #{email}, #{content}, #{date})
